ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the cell type (e.g., Astro_1, Chandelier) */,
  "expanded_label" TEXT /* Expanded label of the cell type (e.g., Astrocyte_1, Chandelier neuron) */,
  "obo_ontology_id" TEXT /* OBO ontology ID for the cell type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cell type (e.g., astrocytes, neurons) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cell type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the marker (e.g., Gfap, Pthlh) */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the marker */,
  "marker_type" TEXT /* Type of the marker (e.g., protein, RNA) */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol associated with the marker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_type_markers" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker */,
  "marker_expression_level" TEXT /* Expression level of the marker in the cell type (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id", "marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_type_functions" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the cell type */,
  "function_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cell type function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id", "function")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_type_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the cell type */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the cell type was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)
